headline: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen Wants eBay, Says He'll Do 'Whatever' It Takes
summary: GameStop Corp. CEO Ryan Cohen is making his clearest case yet for why he wants eBay Inc., framing the proposed deal as a chance to transform one of the largest e-commerce platforms in the U.S. under an owner-operator model. Cohen...

headline: EBay, Palo Alto, Microchip Technology And A Financial Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: EBay shares gained 2.6% to close at $116.13 on Friday while Palo Alto gained 1.9% to settle at $242.83 during the session.
